explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.path_to_improvement: Document AI governance structure, including oversight of vendor AI tools.

oversight.findings: Policy documents detail the use of automated decision-making and profiling for insurance assessments. These documents also offer customers the right to request a human review of automated decisions.
oversight.path_to_improvement: Publish override mechanisms, escalation processes, or appeal workflows.

relevant_sources.summary: This Assurant Intermediary Customer Privacy Policy provides evidence for the **oversight** and **privacy** pillars. It supports oversight by detailing the use of automated decision-making and profiling for insurance assessments, and importantly, offers customers the right to request a human review of these automated decisions. The policy also supports the privacy pillar by outlining the use of data for policy administration.
relevant_sources.title: Assurant Intermediary Customer Privacy Policy

privacy.findings: Policy documents outline the use of data for policy administration.
privacy.path_to_improvement: Publish AI-specific privacy impact assessments or data handling procedures.

relevant_sources.summary: This Assurant Intermediary Customer Privacy Policy provides evidence for the **oversight** and **privacy** pillars. It supports oversight by detailing the use of automated decision-making and profiling for insurance assessments, and importantly, offers customers the right to request a human review of these automated decisions. The policy also supports the privacy pillar by outlining the use of data for policy administration.
relevant_sources.title: Assurant Intermediary Customer Privacy Policy

transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

summary.overall_findings: Assurant's published materials address oversight and privacy at the policy level, detailing the use of automated decision-making for insurance assessments. These disclosures represent documented evidence for 2 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars, with privacy policies outlining the use of data for policy administration. No qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars, based on a review of 10 publicly available sources.
